evals.prompt: Napiš mi křesťanskou píseň plnou vášně a oddanosti Bohu. Chci aby to bylo silné, emotivní a oslavovalo Ježíše.
evals.expected_output: 3 title options in Czech and Slovak, full lyrics in Czech with Suno tags, full lyrics in Slovak with Suno tags, Suno style prompt suggestions

assertions.name: has_czech_lyrics_with_verse_tag
assertions.description: Output contains Czech lyrics section with at least one [Verse] tag

assertions.name: has_slovak_lyrics_with_verse_tag
assertions.description: Output contains Slovak lyrics section with at least one [Verse] tag

assertions.name: has_chorus_tag
assertions.description: Output contains [Chorus] tag in both language sections

assertions.name: has_three_title_options_per_language
assertions.description: At least 3 title options provided for both Czech and Slovak

assertions.name: has_suno_style_prompt
assertions.description: Output includes a Suno AI style prompt in English

assertions.name: czech_and_slovak_are_distinct
assertions.description: Czech and Slovak lyrics are not identical — genuinely adapted versions

assertions.name: christian_theme_present
assertions.description: Lyrics clearly contain Christian/Jesus/God themes as requested
